narrative:
Fairborn 221 (precinct in Greene County) has 678 registered voters, with 67.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.7%, a modest Republican lean of 3.4 percentage points.
